slides.des: We Transform Architectural Vision Into Engineered Stone Reality.
Not Decoration, But Engineered Spatial Performance.
We Build Stone Systems For Hotels, Commercial Spaces, And Landmark Architecture.

slides.tit: EVERY FLOOR BECOMES PART OF THE DESIGN EXPERIENCE
slides.des: Precision Waterjet Inlay Systems For Luxury Interiors Worldwide.

collections.title: COLLECTIONS
collections.heading: NATURAL MARBLE SELECTION
collections.description: Direct Sourcing From Global Quarries. Nine Color Families — White, Grey, Black, Beige, Brown, Blue, Green, Red, Gold. In Stock Year-Round.

waterjet.title: WATERJET
waterjet.heading: CUSTOM WATERJET MEDALLIONS
waterjet.description: High-Pressure Waterjet Cutting At ±0.1mm Accuracy. Master Craftsmen With 10+ Years. 1:1 Dry Lay Inspection Before Shipment.

process.title: HOW WE MAKE IT
process.heading: FROM RAW BLOCK TO FINISHED PRODUCT — ALL IN OUR OWN HANDS
process.description: Own Factory, Full Quality Control. We Never Outsource — Quality Never Leaves Our Sight.

steps.title: SLAB SELECTION
steps.desc: Direct sourcing from global quarries. Every slab is numbered and archived with origin, batch, and shade code.

steps.title: PRECISION CUTTING
steps.desc: Diamond gang saw + sand saw dual system. Waterjet accuracy ±0.1mm. CNC profiling center for complex shapes.

steps.title: DRY LAY INSPECTION
steps.desc: 1:1 pre-assembly before shipment. Master craftsmen with 10+ years inspect every piece individually.

steps.title: EXPORT PACKING
steps.desc: Custom wooden crates, six-side protective treatment, moisture-proof packaging, container tracking to destination port.

video.title: Video
video.heading: Guangzhou International Stone Fair 2026
video.description: KLD Stone at the Guangzhou International Stone Fair — showcasing natural stone collections, waterjet medallions, and precision craftsmanship to global buyers.

spaces.title: PROJECT CASES
spaces.heading: STONE BELONGS IN SPACES, NOT WAREHOUSES
spaces.description: Real Projects — Hotel Lobbies, Villas, Commercial Interiors, And High-End Residences Worldwide.

items.title: SIX-POINT INSPECTION
items.desc: Color consistency, thickness tolerance, six-side visual check, protective treatment — every slab passes before leaving the factory.

items.title: CUSTOM WOODEN CRATES
items.desc: Tailored to product dimensions with EPE foam lining, corrugated separators, and steel strap reinforcement — built to container shipping standards.

items.title: END-TO-END LOGISTICS
items.desc: From Shuitou port to major ports worldwide. Individual packing lists, shipping marks, insurance documents — shipment photos sent on dispatch day.

cta.heading: GET YOUR PROJECT QUOTE WITHIN 24 HOURS
cta.description: Whether You Are A Designer, Contractor, Or Distributor — We Reply To Every Inquiry Within One Business Day.
